## Runtime.Indexers.QuerySpec type

A query specification is a record keyed by IndexerId containing configs for each indexer. Indexers check for their own key and return early if not present.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type QuerySpec = Partial<Record<IndexerId, IIndexerConfig>>;
```
**References:** [IndexerId](./ts-chocolate.indexerid.md)<!-- -->, [IIndexerConfig](./ts-chocolate.runtime.indexers.iindexerconfig.md)
